response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is primarily in TypeScript/Node.js, which raises concerns about his current proficiency in the required systems programming stack.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages
Strong track record in building scalable, distributed systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency systems or geospatial data tiling
Limited evidence of distributed systems work with fault tolerance or real-time map updates
